title: IAAO: Interactive Affordance Learning for Articulated Objects in 3D Environments
title_zh: IAAO：面向3D环境中铰接物体的交互式可供性学习
abstract: This work presents IAAO, a novel framework that builds an explicit 3D model for intelligent agents to gain understanding of articulated objects in their environment through interaction. Unlike prior methods that rely on task-specific networks and assumptions about movable parts, our IAAO leverages large foundation models to estimate interactive affordances and part articulations in three stages. We first build hierarchical features and label fields for each object state using 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) by distilling mask features and view-consistent labels from multi-view images. We then perform object- and part-level queries on the 3D Gaussian primitives to identify static and articulated elements, estimating global transformations and local articulation parameters along with affordances. Finally, scenes from different states are merged and refined based on the estimated transformations, enabling robust affordance-based interaction and manipulation of objects. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Our source code is available at: https://lulusindazc.github.io/IAAOproject/.
abstract_zh: 本文提出IAAO，一种新颖的框架，通过交互为智能体构建显式3D模型，以理解环境中铰接物体的特性。与依赖任务特定网络和可动部件假设的先前方法不同，我们的IAAO利用大型基础模型，分三个阶段估计交互式可供性和部件铰接。首先，通过从多视图图像中蒸馏掩码特征和视图一致标签，使用3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）为每个物体状态构建层次化特征和标签场。然后，对3D高斯原语执行物体级和部件级查询，以识别静态和铰接元素，估计全局变换和局部铰接参数以及可供性。最后，基于估计的变换合并和细化不同状态的场景，实现基于可供性的鲁棒交互和物体操作。实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性。源代码见：https://lulusindazc.github.io/IAAOproject/。
tldr_zh: 提出IAAO框架，利用3D高斯泼溅和基础模型，通过交互学习铰接物体的可供性。
cover_zh: 不用手动标注部件｜IAAO让机器人自己学会开门开抽屉
